description:
MetadataMerge is vestigial - called once but result discarded. The metadata field in FinalizationPlan is set but never read.

**Remove:**
- lib/bedrock/data_plane/commit_proxy/metadata_merge.ex (entire module)
- metadata field from FinalizationPlan struct
- metadata_merge_fn from opts
- MetadataMerge.merge/3 call in finalize_batch/3

**Keep:**
- RoutingData.apply_mutations/2 (actively used for shard_key and layout_log mutations)
title: Remove vestigial MetadataMerge and metadata field from FinalizationPlan
